# Basic Division

Basic division operator

```perl
$result = $a / $b;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Clean Perl Output

```perl
use v5.36;
$result = $a / $b;
```

## Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a / $b;
```
